privacy_receipt.limitation: This tracked fictional fixture received deterministic identifier-pattern checks only; this is not evidence of real-text anonymisation.

cues.observation: The message explicitly rephrases, corrects, or acknowledges a misunderstanding.
cues.limitation: A repair marker does not prove resolution or assign responsibility.

cues.observation: The wording contains one or more uncertainty markers.
cues.limitation: Uncertainty markers can be considerate or accurate; they do not reveal confidence or intent.

cues.observation: The wording contains an explicit preference or request.
cues.limitation: This rule does not measure honesty, confidence, intent, or likely response.

repair_action.title: Edit one repair step
repair_action.editable_text: Put the corrected meaning in one sentence after the repair marker.
repair_action.rationale: This optional edit follows the displayed wording or structure cue.

limitations: Deterministic wording checks are not peer-reviewed inference models.
Results do not infer diagnosis, emotion, attraction, intent, compatibility, or outcomes.
Dialect and mixed-language behavior is not benchmarked for participant use.
